message:
feat(core): add fault containment policy enum and budget query/constructor helpers

Introduce the asx_containment_policy enum (FAIL_FAST, POISON_REGION,
ERROR_ONLY) in asx_config.h with profile-derived defaults, enabling
the runtime to select containment behavior based on the active safety
profile (bd-hwb.15).

Add two budget helper functions in core/budget.h and budget.c:
- asx_budget_polls(): query remaining poll quota from a budget
- asx_budget_from_polls(): construct a budget from a poll count with
  unconstrained deadline/cost (used by cancellation cleanup budgets)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
